items.question: Does it ship any CSS?
items.answer: No — markup is tokenized Tailwind bound to CSS-variable design tokens. Themes only change the variable values.

items.question: Which targets can it generate?
items.answer: Drupal SDC, Drupal Code Components (Preact), React, Vue, and Storybook, plus a Drupal paragraph mapping.

items.question: How does theming work?
items.answer: All themes share one fixed set of CSS-variable names; only the values differ, so swapping a value set re-skins everything.

items.question: Is it accessible?
items.answer: Components target WCAG AA with real semantics and keyboard support; pnpm audit runs axe-core against each rendered component.
